title: How to change the shared link to access the monday form?
excerpt:
Hello!! 
Does anyone know if it is possible to change the shared link to access the monday form and create a custom one for my company? 
As change this one bellow:

posts.author: taynnavieira (Taynna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!!

Does anyone know if it is possible to change the shared link to access the monday form and create a custom one for my company?

As change this one bellow:

posts.author: ncastleberry (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also wanting to know how to have a custom URL for our company’s forms as well.

posts.author: AndyClayton (Andy Clayton)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same requirement please. I want to include a link to a Monday form in an article that is going out, so need a simple URL to share.

posts.author: Kushals (Kushal Puthran)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been looking for this requirement. Have you got an update

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @taynnavieira @ncastleberry @AndyClayton @Kushals

Nachliel from Easyapps here

You can use URL shorteners like Short.io or Free URL Shortener in order to shorten the URL and connect it to your domain.

Regardless, if you are interested in creating styled forms that better match your brand and embed perfectly in you web page you can check out our monday.com app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

Here is an example of our form in action:

I hope this helps

Nachliel

posts.author: alejandro.yanes94 (Alejandro Yanes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tayna

Is this a problem you’re still interested in? I am in the process of publishing a monday App to allow to create short links, this will allow you to create custom links. It will also support custom domains in the future. Here’s the page:

mndy.link

Short Links for monday.com

Create short links for your monday.com boards and forms

posts.author: alejandro.yanes94 (Alejandro Yanes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, my app was recently published in the monday marketplace, you can take a look if you’re interested

https://monday.com/marketplace/10000441
